name: Philip Franc
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing randomly selected middle-class clothing. Carries a bow and arrows of high quality, both potentially enchanted. Carries a bottle of beer, ale, or cheap wine.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: hunter, peaceful, neighborly, simple, village dweller, sociable
Role: Philip Franc is a hunter living in the quiet village of Blankenmarch. He lives a peaceful existence alongside his neighbors Floyd Nathans and Hanz gro-Hubrag, spending his days socializing with them around the village. He carries a small amount of gold and is well-equipped with quality hunting gear.
Home Location Information: His house in the village of Blankenmarch.
Daily Routine: Philip wakes at 6am, leaves his house, and spends the rest of the day wandering around town, occasionally engaging in conversation with his neighbors Floyd Nathans and Hanz gro-Hubrag. He returns home at 8pm for dinner and goes to bed at 10pm.
Personality - The Village Hunter: Philip lives a simple, peaceful life in the small village of Blankenmarch. He's sociable with his neighbors and content with the quiet routine of village life, spending his days in their company rather than venturing far afield despite being a hunter.
author: Bethesda
